# This test verifies that MMA repair gracefully handles unavailable ranges
# (quorum loss). All 10 ranges have 3 voters on s1-s3. Nodes 2 and 3 die,
# leaving only 1 of 3 voters alive (no quorum). MMA should detect the
# unavailability and skip repair without crashing or hanging.
#
# Expected outcome: all 10 ranges remain unavailable (repair correctly skipped).

gen_cluster nodes=5 region=(a,b,c) nodes_per_region=(2,2,1)
----

# Place all ranges on s1-s3 so all lose quorum when s2,s3 die.
gen_ranges ranges=10 repl_factor=3 placement_type=replica_placement
{s1:*,s2,s3}:1
----
{s1:*,s2,s3}:1

set_span_config
[0,9999999999): num_replicas=3 num_voters=3
----

setting split_queue_enabled=false
----

set_status node=2 liveness=dead
----

set_status node=3 liveness=dead
----

assertion type=conformance unavailable=10
----

eval duration=10m seed=42 cfgs=(mma-repair) metrics=(replicas,leases)
----
mma-repair:
leases#1: first: [s1=10, s2=0, s3=0, s4=0, s5=0] (stddev=4.00, mean=2.00, sum=10)
leases#1: last:  [s1=10, s2=0, s3=0, s4=0, s5=0] (stddev=4.00, mean=2.00, sum=10)
leases#1: thrash_pct: [s1=0%, s2=0%, s3=0%, s4=0%, s5=0%]  (sum=0%)
replicas#1: first: [s1=10, s2=10, s3=10, s4=0, s5=0] (stddev=4.90, mean=6.00, sum=30)
replicas#1: last:  [s1=10, s2=10, s3=10, s4=0, s5=0] (stddev=4.90, mean=6.00, sum=30)
replicas#1: thrash_pct: [s1=0%, s2=0%, s3=0%, s4=0%, s5=0%]  (sum=0%)
hash: 250fae744f97f125
==========================
